info.title: 民宿价格数据分析系统

post.description:
Login endpoint - OAuth2 compatible.
Returns JWT access token.
Login endpoint using JSON body (alternative to OAuth2 form).

get.description: Get current logged-in user information.
Get current user profile information.

put.description: Update current user profile and preferences.

get.description: Get user recommendation preferences.

schema.title: Response Get User Preferences Api User Me Preferences Get

put.description:
更新用户偏好设置（完整版）

支持设置：
- 偏好商圈
- 价格区间
- 出行目的（情侣/家庭/商务/考研/休闲）
- 必带设施列表
更新用户偏好设置（别名）

get.description:

Response Remove Favorite Api User Me Favorites  Unit Id  Delete

get.description:

schema.title: Response Add View History Api User Me History Post
Response Clear View History Api User Me History Delete
Response Remove View History Api User Me History  Unit Id  Delete

get.description: 获取收藏房源的价格提醒设置

schema.title: Response Get Favorite Alerts Api User Me Favorites Alerts Get

put.description:
更新收藏房源的价格提醒设置

- enabled: 是否启用价格提醒
- threshold: 价格变动阈值 (0.1 = 10%)

schema.title: Response Update Favorite Alert Api User Me Favorites  Unit Id  Alert Put

get.description: 获取房源列表（分页、筛选、排序）

parameters.name: sort_by

schema.description: 排序方式: price_asc, price_desc, rating, favorite_count
schema.title: Sort By

parameters.description: 排序方式: price_asc, price_desc, rating, favorite_count

get.description: 获取房源详情

获取房源图片画廊
按类别分类：客厅、卧室、厨房、卫生间、阳台、外景

获取房源价格日历

- start_date: 开始日期 (YYYY-MM-DD)
- end_date: 结束日期 (YYYY-MM-DD)
- include_history: 是否包含历史价格，默认False（只返回今天及以后）

如果不传日期参数:
- include_history=false: 返回今天起30天
- include_history=true: 返回所有可用数据（历史+未来）

获取相似房源推荐
基于同商圈、同户型、价格相近的房源

schema.title: Response Get Similar Listings Api Listings  Unit Id  Similar Get

get.description:
获取热门房源排行
按收藏数排序

schema.title: Response Get Hot Listings Api Listings Hot Ranking Get

get.description:
获取标签分类
返回所有标签分类及标签列表，用于房源上传时选择标签

schema.title: Response Get Tag Categories Api Tags Categories Get
